name: CONCRETE
short_description: CONCRETE is an atmospheric first-person exploration game presented with modernised retro 3D visuals. Explore large distinct environments packed with hidden secrets, collectables, puzzles, and physics objects to interact with.
detailed_description:
Strange statues have begun to materialise across the abandoned world of CONCRETE. They hold an unnatural grip on the minds of the recently missing population.

Hired to explore this desolate world, you must rely on your wits, surroundings, and navigational skills to find and destroy these ominous figures.

FIRST PERSON EXPLORATION

  • Move freely through environments with a weighty and responsive player character

ATMOSPHERIC IMMERSION

  • Discover an atmospheric, isolated, and abandoned world presented with a retro flare

PHYSICAL OBJECTS

  • Interact with and manipulate objects scattered around the environment, such as crates, barrels, soda cans, books, and many, MANY more

  • Use these to your advantage, like stacking a pile of crates to climb over a high wall

NOTES AND SECRETS

  • Read notes to piece together information and secrets from environmental clues

2-4 HOUR LONG EXPERIENCE

  • 4 large unique maps to explore packed with statues to find, puzzles to solve, secrets to discover, challenges to overcome, and an ever-present dark and foreboding atmosphere

  • In addition: 4 collectable minigames, 30 hidden VHS tapes, 48 achievements, and plenty of fun to be had stacking crates as high as you can manage
